strengths: Direct match on primary stack: TypeScript and Node.js are central to current and recent roles, with React and MongoDB also present.
Explicit AI-agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — a stated requirement.
15+ years of diverse full-stack delivery across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud, demonstrating strong architectural breadth and adaptability.
concerns: No mention of NestJS, which is a named primary framework; experience is mostly with raw Node.js and other frameworks (Ember.js, Express-style).
Kotlin is absent from the resume despite being listed as a secondary technology requirement; Java appears only in older embedded/robotics contexts.
Testing tools listed as required (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are not explicitly named; TDD practice is evidenced but framework-specific depth is unverifiable from the resume.
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match on the foundational requirements — TypeScript, Node.js, React, cloud/container familiarity, and a genuine TDD and craftsmanship orientation are all well-evidenced across multiple senior roles. The AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is a direct hit on an increasingly rare requirement. The main gaps are NestJS (the named backend framework) and Kotlin, both of which are learnable quickly given his demonstrated polyglot history, so they represent ramp-up cost rather than a fundamental mismatch.
